nodes.name: Dayak blue flycatcher
nodes.summary: The Dayak blue flycatcher (Cyornis montanus) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is endemic to the island of Borneo. The Dayak blue flycatcher, formerly considered conspecific with the Javan blue flycatcher (Cyornis banyumas), was split as a distinct species by the IOC in 2021. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Dayak blue flycatcher (Cyornis montanus) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is endemic to the island of Borneo.
